message:
E2E tests must interact only via the HTTP API. Direct Mongoose access
bypasses auth, validation, and tenant isolation middleware and hides
real integration bugs.
fixHint:
Seed data via POST endpoints, assert via GET responses. Start Express
on random ports and exercise the full middleware chain.
